prompt: Dark studio, deep navy backdrop, glowing purple light sweep reveals bold white title text 'EV Calculator' — cinematic lens flare, slow dramatic push-in, premium Apple-reveal atmosphere.
Sleek smartphone floats on dark surface, purple ambient glow, camera slowly orbits as a finger taps the asset price field on the dark-themed calculator interface, crisp and deliberate.
Smartphone screen fills frame, probability-weighted results cascade onto display with subtle glow pulses in violet, camera pulls back gracefully revealing full interface, confident and satisfying.
